title: Trails&Tales Backport
description: The  Trails&Tales Backport (OneTwenty) project is a backport of new version of Minecraft (1.20) on latest version.
body:
[![Kinetic hosting code frost15](https://i.imgur.com/KjxYj3F.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=189)

# The Trails & Tales project is a backport of new version of Minecraft (1.20) on Minecraft.

## The Trails & Tales project is a Minecraft mod, it gonna add every changes of Minecraft 1.20 to Minecraft.


## Items
 
| Name | Added? |
|-------------------------|--------|
| Trim Smithing Templates | ✅ |
| Camel Spawn Egg | ⛔ |
| Sniffer Spawn Egg | ⛔ |
